name: libdevel-size-perl
title: libdevel-size-perl
summary: Perl extension for finding the memory usage of Perl variables
description:
Perl extension for finding the memory usage of Perl variables
Devel::Size figures out the real sizes of Perl variables in bytes. Call
functions with a reference to the variable you want the size of. If the
variable is a plain scalar it returns the size of the scalar. If the
variable is a hash or an array, use a reference when calling.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libdevel-size-perl because Perl extension for finding the memory usage of Perl variables.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libdevel-size-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libdevel-size-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libdevel-size-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
